Uses of Annotation Interface
org.springframework.cloud.gateway.server.mvc.common.Shortcut

Packages that use Shortcut
Package
Description
org.springframework.cloud.gateway.server.mvc.filter
Package that contains implementations of FilterFunctions.
org.springframework.cloud.gateway.server.mvc.predicate
Package that contains RequestPredicate implementations.

  • Uses of Shortcut in org.springframework.cloud.gateway.server.mvc.predicate

    Methods in org.springframework.cloud.gateway.server.mvc.predicate with annotations of type Shortcut
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static org.springframework.web.servlet.function.RequestPredicate
    GatewayRequestPredicates.after(ZonedDateTime dateTime)
     
    static org.springframework.web.servlet.function.RequestPredicate
    GatewayRequestPredicates.before(ZonedDateTime dateTime)
     
    static org.springframework.web.servlet.function.RequestPredicate
    GatewayRequestPredicates.between(ZonedDateTime dateTime1, ZonedDateTime dateTime2)
     
    static org.springframework.web.servlet.function.RequestPredicate
    GatewayRequestPredicates.cookie(String name, @Nullable String regexp)
     
    static org.springframework.web.servlet.function.RequestPredicate
    GatewayRequestPredicates.header(String header, @Nullable String regexp)
     
    static org.springframework.web.servlet.function.RequestPredicate
    GatewayRequestPredicates.host(String... patterns)
    Return a RequestPredicate that tests the request host against the given host patterns.
    static org.springframework.web.servlet.function.RequestPredicate
    GatewayRequestPredicates.method(org.springframework.http.HttpMethod... methods)
     
    static org.springframework.web.servlet.function.RequestPredicate
    GatewayRequestPredicates.path(String... patterns)
    Return a RequestPredicate that tests the request path against the given path pattern.
    static org.springframework.web.servlet.function.RequestPredicate
    GatewayRequestPredicates.query(String param)
    Return a RequestPredicate that tests the presence of a request parameter.
    static org.springframework.web.servlet.function.RequestPredicate
    GatewayRequestPredicates.query(String param, @Nullable String regexp)
    Return a RequestPredicate that tests the presence of a request parameter if the regexp is empty, or, otherwise finds if any value of the parameter matches the regexp.
    static org.springframework.web.servlet.function.RequestPredicate
    GatewayRequestPredicates.version(String version)
    RequestPredicate to match to the request API version extracted from and parsed with the configured ApiVersionStrategy.
    static org.springframework.web.servlet.function.RequestPredicate
    GatewayRequestPredicates.weight(String group, int weight)
    A predicate which will select a route based on its assigned weight.
